---
title: "City of Beaverton"
year: 1
image: /images/beaverton_OR.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Beaverton, Oregon"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
Bell & Associates worked with City staff, franchised haulers, and recycling
processors to implement a fully automated roller cart collection system for the
neighboring Cities’ 28,000 combined residential customers. The dual-stream,
co-mingle system allows the mixing of all materials with the exception of glass
and motor oil. The overall objective was to keep the implementation and
collection system cost low by increasing collection productivity and collected
materials, and by standardizing the entire collection fleet (solid waste,
recycling, and yard debris). The cart program is expected to collect 10,350
tons of recoverable material a year, or 750 pounds per residential customer.
The rate impact was \$0 in the City of Beaverton.

[By Ian Poellet - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=43210574)
:::
